title: eulophia biloba
intro: Eulophia biloba, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia biloba include reducing inflammation, treating fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
